summary: Resolved TBD-M2-2 (Cyclopts CLI ships in M2), merged to main (FF 718a196..c255773), and promoted the M2 registration-surface spec to the backlog as an 8-item DAG (ids 2140-2147). Root-caused a praxia workspace-id block (stale id frozen in RunContext at MCP boot) fixed by a process restart.
